title: Inheritance, MRO, Super, and Mixins · Language Clinic: Oop Composition Vs Inheritance
summary: Evaluate extension designs for physical, digital, and restricted library resources. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop composition vs inheritance increment in an extensible resource type hierarchy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose composition, protocols, delegation, or inheritance by variability, substitutability, ownership, and change cost.
Design narrow stateless or low-state mixins with explicit requirements instead of partial domain base classes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
